question: What is the position of the white pillow on the wicker chair? Select from the following options: (A) Left side of the chair. (B) Right side of the chair. (C) Center of the chair. (D) It is not possible to identify the position.
gold_answer: It is not possible to identify the position
answer_choices: It is not possible to identify the position

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A white pillow placed on the left side of the wicker chair, slightly off-center.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: A white pillow centered on the wicker chair or positioned on the right side.

inpaint_prompt_used: A white pillow placed on the left side of the wicker chair, slightly off-center.
